spirited away.title: Spirited Away
quotes: "Now go, and don't look back." - Haku
"Quit whining. It's fun to move to a new place, it's an adventure." - Yuko Ogino
"You still haven't noticed that something precious to you has been replaced." - Haku
"That's how Yubaba controls you... by stealing your name." - Haku
"Something you wouldn't recognize. It's called love." - Kamaji
"Once you do something, you never forget. Even if you can't remember." - Zeniba
"I've gotta get out of this place. Someday I'm getting on that train." - Lin
"I'm not leaving here until you give me a job!" - Chihiro
"Don't worry! You've got Daddy here. He's got credit cards and cash." - Akio Ogino

ponyo.title: Ponyo
quotes: "You should never judge others by their looks." - Lisa
"You're not busy, you're five!" - Koichi
"Don't worry, Ponyo. No matter what, I will protect you. I promise." - Sosuke
"She's big and beautiful, but she can be very scary." - Tomoko
"I'd let a fish lick me if it'd get me out of this wheelchair." - Akiko
"I say we start with dessert and go backwards. It's been a backwards kind of day!" - Lisa
"I love Ponyo whether she's a fish, a human, or something in between." - Sosuke
"Life is mysterious and amazing, but we have work to do now, and I need you both to stay calm." - Lisa

arietty.title: Arietty
arietty.titlejp: 借りぐらしのアリエッティ
quotes: "Sometimes you have to fight for the things that are worth fighting for." - Arietty
"When I saw you, I just wanted to find a way to protect you." - Shawn
"We've been seen, and borrowers aren't supposed to be seen!" - Arietty
"Strange things have been happening here, and I know why." - Hara

howl's moving castle.title: Howl's Moving Castle
quotes: "It's been a pleasure meeting you, even if you are my least favourite vegetable." - Sophie
"One thing you can always count on is that hearts change." - Turnip Head
"It's not easy being old." - Sophie
"I give up. I see no point in living if I can't be beautiful." - Howl
"They say that the best blaze burns the brightest when circumstances are at their worst." - Sophie
"Here's another curse for you - may all your bacon burn." - Calcifer
"There you are sweetheart, sorry I'm late, I was looking everywhere for you." - Howl
"A heart's a heavy burden." - Sophie

my neighbour totoro.title: My Neighbour Totoro
quotes: "Hide! Whoops, I thought that was a policeman. Hello!" - Satsuki
"Try laughing. Then whatever scares you will go away." - Tatsuo Kusakabe
"I hate boys! But I love Nanny's food better than anything else in the whole wide world." - Satsuki
"Trees and people used to be good friends." - Tatsuo Kusakabe
"I've always wanted to live in a haunted house. It's been my lifelong dream." - Tatsuo Kusakabe

kiki's delivery service.title: Kiki's Delivery Service
quotes: "We can fly with our spirit." - Kiki
"Maybe I can stay and find some other nice people who will like me and accept me for who I am." - Kiki
"We need to find our own inspiration, Kiki. Sometimes it's not easy." - Ursula
"Maybe I need to find my own inspiration. But am I ever going to find it? Is it worth all the trouble?" - Kiki
"All right, first: don't panic! Second: don't panic! And third: did I mention not to panic?" - Jiji
"Just follow your heart and keep smiling." - Kokiri

castle in the sky.title: Castle in the Sky
quotes: "Ah, what can I tell ya? They just really like dessert." - Dola
"No matter how many weapons you have, no matter how great your technology might be, the world cannot live without love." - Sheeta
"I have really had enough of your incredible stupidity." - Muska
"The earth speaks to all of us, and if we listen, we can understand." - Uncle Pom
"Stop wriggling, ya little worm!" - Henri
"Blast! I really hate that man." - General
"Full speed ahead!" - Dola
"Time's up. What is your answer?" - Muska

the wind rises.title: The Wind Rises
quotes: "Inspiration unlocks the future." - Caproni
"She was beautiful, just like the wind." - Caproni
"Be careful. This may be a dream but you can still lose your head!" - Caproni
"Bravo. A beautiful dream." - Caproni
"A summer to remember." - Castorp
"Life is wonderful, isn't it?" - Satomi
"I'd forgotten what rainbows look like." - Hirokoshi

princess mononoke.title: Princess Mononoke
quotes: "Look, everyone! This is what hatred looks like!" - Prince Ashitaka
"You want some of our iron? Mine your own!" - Townsman
"Ugh, I smell like a human." - San

whisper of the heart.title: Whisper of the Heart
quotes: "I don't want to be a burden! I want to be useful!" - Shizuku
"Why do we change, I wonder?" - Shizuku
"There's always a voice inside me that says, 'Things won't go that smoothly.'" - Shizuku
"Don't expect perfection at first." - Shirou
"The dense one is me, isn't it?" - Shizuku

porco rosso.title: Porco Rosso
quotes: "I'd rather be a pig than a fascist." - Porco Rosso
"A pig's gotta fly." - Porco Rosso

pom poko.title: Pom Poko
quotes: "You see? Talk is useless!" - Gonta
"That's for beginners!" - Fireball Oroku

the cat returns.title: The Cat Returns
quotes: "Always believe in yourself. Do this and no matter where you are, you will have nothing to fear." - Baron
"Whenever someone creates something with all of their heart, then that creation is given a soul." - Baron

from up on poppy hill.title: From Up on Poppy Hill
quotes: "There's no future for people who worship the future, and forget the past." - Shun Kazama

nausicaa of the valley of the wind.title: Nausicaa of the Valley of the Wind
quotes: "Why does everything that's good for you have to taste so bad?" - Asbel
"It's so beautiful. It's hard to believe these spores could kill me." - Nausicaa
"Nice valley. I think I'll keep it." - Kushana

the boy and the heron.title: The Boy and the Heron
the boy and the heron.titlejp: 君たちはどう生きるか
quotes: "I'll be your guide." - The Grey Heron
"Mahito turned into a little budgie." - Shoichi Maki

your name.title: Your Name
quotes: "Treasure the experience. Dreams fade away after you wake up." - Hitoha Miyamizu
